name: keyguard-app
desc: A third-party client for the Bitwarden platform and KeePass (KDBX) files. It autofills your logins, supports passkeys, works offline, and runs a Watchtower tha…
descFull: A third-party client for the Bitwarden platform and KeePass (KDBX) files. It autofills your logins, supports passkeys, works offline, and runs a Watchtower that finds leaked and reused passwords and other issues.
